Import the necessary modules from TensorFlow and other dependencies as specified in the import section
Define a batch size of 32 and image dimensions of 224x224 for input data
Create random uniform input data with shape (batch_size, height, width, 3)
Load a pre-trained model using `build_model` function from `official` module, specifying num_classes=1000
Create fake labels for the batch of inputs with shape (batch_size, num_classes) and random values between 0 and 1
Call `train_step` method with the inputs and fake labels on the model, and a dummy optimizer that always returns zero gradients
Capture the output of the loss calculation in `all_losses[self.loss]` inside the `train_step` method
